raw: Use the library pass code when ordering your tickets and receive 50% off each ticket! You can select up to 4 tickets with this discount pass and children under 3 are free. For Tickets: www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/ Select a date to visit Georges Island, Spectacle Island, or Paddocks Island from Hingham Select up to 4 tickets then continue to Booking Details Enter the library's unique code found printed on the pass in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply Complete your transaction & bring your phone or printed copy of your barcode to board the ferry Spring schedule Georges Island: May 15, 2026-June 14, 2026 Thursday through Sunday Summer Schedule Georges Island: June 16 through September 1 Everyday Summer schedule Spectacle Island: July 15 through September 1 Everyday Fall schedule Spectacle Island: September 4 through September 21 Thursday through Sunday End of season schedule Spectacle Island: September 26 through October 13 Friday through Sunday Summer schedule Paddocks Island from HIngham: June 15 through September 7 Everyday but Tuesday Fall schedule Paddocks Island from Hingham: September 10 through October 12 Thursday through Sunday
